title: Sr. AI/ML Engineer
company_focus:
End-to-end software solutions for customizable products and
spaces design industry
description:
Job Title: Sr AI/ML Engineer Location: Bangalore, India
(Hybrid) Full time

About Us Cyncly is a global technology powerhouse with
2,400+ employees and 70,000+ customers across 100+
countries. Cyncly transforms the way customizable products
and spaces are imagined, designed, sold, managed and made.
Our end-to-end software solutions connect professional
designers, retailers and manufacturers to the world's
largest repository of product content. Today, our business
spans across the Kitchen & Bath, Furniture, Window, Glass &
Door, and Flooring industries with operations in North &
South America, Europe, Asia Pacific and Africa.

Cyncly brings over 30 years of experience to deliver more
value for our customers through an expanded portfolio of
end-to-end solutions. Our global presence allows us to
provide world-class support and sales with a local touch,
providing the best possible customer experience.

Cyncly is now embarking on an exciting journey as we
continue to expand through strong organic growth and
complementary acquisition s, backed by leading growth
private equity firms specializing in technology. Cyncly &
The Power of AI At Cyncly, we believe in unlocking the power
of AI to deliver highly personalized and extraordinary
experiences for our customers and their clients. We are on a
dynamic journey of seeking exceptional talent to add
critical AI models and functionality to our products used by
over 17,000 customers worldwide. This is opportunity to be a
part of a collaborative team that fosters continuous
learning and growth, where you'll work on exciting data
driven projects that redefine the Spaces for Living
industry. AI is reshaping private and business life at an
unprecedented speed, and Cyncly is committed to leading the
charge in delivering new sources of value for our customers.

About the Role As a Sr. AI/ML Engineer in AL Innovation
Center Team, you’ll design and deploy cutting-edge AI and
computer vision models, crafting APIs that seamlessly
integrate solutions into client applications. With expertise
in Azure, Docker, and AKS, you’ll ensure cloud deployments
are efficient and scalable to meet evolving client needs.
Compliance, security, and privacy are central to our
solutions, and your knowledge in MongoDB and Vector DB will
drive optimized, high-performance databases. With a focus on
image processing, LLMs, and mentorship, this is your chance
to drive innovation in the Space Designing industry.

Key Position Responsibilities include:

- Design data solutions to meet business, technical and user
  requirements. This includes building REST APIs that meet
  the functional/non-functional business requirements and
  meets the standards.
- Designing of DB schema for Vector Database and writing
  efficient and scalable queries.
- Meet the highest quality standards in code. And evangelise
  code quality among the team.
- Create quick POCs to demonstrate and show case the
  technology capabilities in solving the business need.
- Building robust build and deployment pipelines using Azure
  DevOPs tools. Working with DevOps engineers to make sure
  continuous integration and continuous deployment.
- Understanding the cyber security threats and provide
  solutions to mitigate the security risks.
- Trouble shooting and debugging skills to quickly identify
  the root causes and address the issues with both tactical
  and permanent solution.
- Work with Data scientists and Data Engineers in
  understanding the end to end design of the enterprise
  systems. Contribute in technical discussion in providing
  best software solution.
- Make the application scale to the demand. Help devops
  engineers in configuring and deploying in a secured and
  highly scalable cloud environment.
- Improve the Coding standards and DevOps maturity by
  constantly adopting the best standards.
- Maintain unit testing, integrated testing and automated test
  environments for quicker delivery.
- Deliver on time with high quality.
- Maintain technical documentation of the solution, which
  presents the design to various stake holders.
- Provide guidance and mentoring to Interns/Freshers and other
  AI/ML engineers.

Required experience and qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in computer science or IT-related courses.
- 3+ years of experience in Data Area.
- Experience in Python in developing APIs using FastAPI and
  MongoDB.
- Experience in python libraries like Tensorflow, pyTorch,
  OpenCV, Pillow,scikit-image etc.
- Experience in Machine Learning and Computer Vision.
- Expertise in Docker, Kubernetes, Azure Cloud Applications
  and Azure Cloud.
- Solid knowledge in relational and NoSQL databases (SQL
  Server, MongoDB).
- Must have the required knowledge to understand/build complex
  systems for businesses.
- Experience with development tools/frameworks: Fast API,
  Flask, Streamlit, Conda, REST API,
- Knowledge of Azure cloud resources like Azure Cloud
  Applications, Azure Storage accounts, Azure Key Vault,
  Azure Front Door, Azure Container Registry, Azure Machine
  Learning workspace.
- Experience in Azure DevOps, Building build and deployment
  pipelines.
- Analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making skills.
- Demonstrate excellent analytical, technical, interpersonal,
  and organizational skills and be a good team player.
- Experience working in an agile environment as an important
  part of the team.
- Excellent communication skills with sponsors, CSM teams, and
  clients.

Working for Us At Cyncly, we’re a global family that
collaborates with humility and respect for one another. With
more than 2,400 employees around the world, we not only
recognize our diverse perspectives, we champion our
different outlooks and firmly believe it to be what makes us
better together.

You can expect to work in a supportive and nurturing
environment, with experts in their fields who strive for
quality and excellence without compromising others. We also
believe in a flexible and autonomous working environment,
focused on the continual growth of our employees.

Diversity of experience and skills combined with passion is
a key to innovation and brilliance, so we encourage
applicants from all backgrounds to apply to our roles.

That’s who we are: A team that recognizes our strength is in
working together to not only get things done, but also lead
the industry with a bold approach that’s dedicated to making
our customers better. Come join us.
responsibilities: Design and deploy AI and computer vision models for production use
Build REST APIs using FastAPI that integrate AI solutions into client applications
Design and optimize Vector Database schemas and write efficient queries
Create POCs to demonstrate AI technology capabilities for business needs
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps for AI model deployment
Ensure cloud deployments are efficient and scalable using Docker, Kubernetes, and Azure AKS
Implement security, privacy, and compliance standards for AI solutions
Mentor interns, freshers, and other AI/ML engineers on the team
use_cases: Product visualization and customization for Kitchen & Bath, Furniture, Windows, and Flooring industries
Connecting designers, retailers, and manufacturers through AI-enhanced content
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves designing and deploying AI/ML models,
specifically computer vision and LLM-based solutions. The
position requires hands-on work with deep learning
frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch), building models, and
integrating them into production systems via APIs.
